name: Mobile — homepage renders and is usable at 375px width

planSteps.description: Set the browser viewport to a mobile size of 375 x 812 (iPhone-class portrait)
The 'ChatDock' brand/heading is visible in the header
The primary hero call-to-action linking to the builder (text like 'Configure a bot') is visible and fully within the 375px-wide viewport (not clipped or overflowing off-screen)
The page does not require horizontal scrolling: content fits the mobile width with no element extending beyond the right edge
Tap/click the 'Configure a bot' hero call-to-action
The URL is now https://chatdock-app.vercel.app/builder — navigation works on mobile
